creator: chris@aims.com.au
text:
Howdy,

I've checked this on a freshly installed 4.4 box and a freshly installed 4.5
box with a checkout of the ports tree as at Fri Dec 21 09:30:01 PST 2001
(arrival date of PR). The dependency on X works correctly. Also,
/usr/ports/INDEX currently shows a dependency on X.
If you're still experiencing this problem, then you probably have a local
configuration problem.

Regards,
Chris Knight
Systems Administrator
AIMS Independent Computer Professionals
